title: A visual timeline of the collision between an Air Canada plane and firetruck at LaGuardia Airport | CNN
text:
Source: CNN

American and Canadian investigators havelaunched an investigationat New York’s LaGuardia Airportafter an Air Canada plane collidedwith a firetruck just after landing Sunday night.

The pilot and copilot werekilled, while dozens of plane passengers and two people in the truck were injured, according to law enforcement officials.

CNN is piecing together what happened during the deadly collision in a timeline, maps and photos.

The National Transportation Safety Board is leading the investigation into the crash, with the Federal Aviation Administration andCanada’s Transportation Safety Boardalso joining the investigation.

The airport reopened on Monday at 2 p.m. ET after a ground stop had been issued following the crash. Runway 4 will remain closed until at least Friday morning, according to a public notice from the FAA.
